en.text:
I’m a passionate {{Software Developer}} with over [[4+ years of professional experience]] in ASP.NET MVC, C#, SQL Server, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. I specialize in developing and maintaining enterprise-level government applications.

Currently working at MPOnline Ltd., I have contributed to major projects including MPPSC, OTR, and WCD portals. My experience includes application development, database management, Aadhaar eKYC integration, performance optimization, debugging, testing, and deployment.

I enjoy solving real-world problems through technology and continuously improving my technical expertise to deliver reliable and scalable software solutions. I look forward to collaborating [[with you!]]

en.title: {{Technology}}
en.text: Passionate about software development, emerging technologies, and continuous learning.
